title: Generalize narrow observers
goal: Generalize the narrow observer pattern used for task systemd unit show into a reusable read-only observer shape for bounded systemd/journal-style diagnostics.

acceptance.assertion: Reusable observer contract defines fixed command shapes, argument validation, output bounds and non-mutation guarantees.
Production hosts do not gain generic systemctl, journalctl or shell authority through the generalized path.
Existing task reconcile narrow observer behavior remains compatible.
Tests cover allowed fixed observer shapes and rejected unbounded or mutating shapes.

metadata.reason: PR #103 added one narrow task observer; broader observer design was intentionally deferred.
